part.title: Luna Hub UI
part.description: Frontend component documentation for the Luna Hub interface

code_blocks.description: Debug keyword highlighting and auto-scroll effect

subsections.description: Voice interaction controls with push-to-talk and hands-free modes.
features: Visual status indicator with pulse animations

subsections.description: Displays engine health, actor status, and context window visualization.
features: Active actors list with status dots

subsections.description: Displays Luna's current consciousness state including mood and attention topics.
features: Mood display with status dot color
Active attention topics with weight bars
Top personality traits with emoji indicators

subsections.description: Modal overlay for detailed personality monitoring and patch system visualization.

rows: Pie chart (topics), bar chart (lock-in states), quick stats
List of personality patches with expandable details

subsections.api_endpoint: GET /debug/personality - Polled every 3 seconds when open

subsections.description: Modal overlay for debugging the revolving context window.
features: Ring filter buttons (ALL, CORE, INNER, MIDDLE, OUTER)
TTL and relevance display per item

subsections.description: Collapsible panel showing Luna's conversation memory buffer.
Real-time stream of Luna's internal processing via SSE.
Slide-out panel for Luna parameter tuning and system configuration.

rows: Browse and adjust Luna's tunable parameters
Manage tuning sessions, view iteration history

subsections.title: Glass Morphism
subsections.description: The signature visual style uses backdrop blur with subtle transparency.
Core API communication hook for engine status and streaming.

return_value.code:
{
  // State
  status: EngineStatus | null,
  consciousness: ConsciousnessData | null,
  isConnected: boolean,
  isLoading: boolean,
  error: string | null,

  // Actions
  sendMessage: (text: string) => Promise<Response | null>,
  streamMessage: (text: string, onToken, onComplete) => Promise<void>,
  streamPersona: (text: string, callbacks) => Promise<void>,
  abort: () => Promise<void>,
  relaunchSystem: () => Promise<Response | null>,
  refresh: () => Promise<void>,
}

subsections.description: Chat message management with streaming support.
Voice interaction state machine with SSE connection.

return_value.code:
{
  // State
  voiceState: VoiceState,
  isRunning: boolean,
  transcription: string | null,
  response: string | null,
  error: string | null,
  handsFree: boolean,

  // Actions
  startVoice: (handsFreeMode?: boolean) => Promise<Response | null>,
  stopVoice: () => Promise<Response | null>,
  startListening: () => Promise<Response | null>,
  stopListening: () => Promise<Response>,
  speakResponse: (text: string) => Promise<Response | null>,

  // Derived State
  isListening: boolean,
  isThinking: boolean,
  isSpeaking: boolean,
  isIdle: boolean,
  isInactive: boolean,
}

subsections.title: Connection Management
subsections.description: The Luna Hub maintains three SSE connections for real-time updates.

code.code:
# Navigate to frontend directory
cd frontend

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start development server
npm run dev

# Frontend runs on http://localhost:5173
# Backend expected on http://localhost:8000

subsections.title: Environment Setup
subsections.description: The frontend expects the backend API at `http://localhost:8000`. This is hardcoded in the hooks.

hardcoded_api.code:
// All hooks use this constant
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000';

code.code:
# Production build
npm run build

# Preview production build
npm run preview

# Output in /frontend/dist/

subsections.title: Project Structure
subsections.structure:
frontend/
+-- src/
|   +-- App.jsx           # Main LunaHub component
|   +-- main.jsx          # Entry point
|   +-- index.css         # Global styles
|   +-- components/
|   |   +-- index.js      # Component exports
|   |   +-- ChatPanel.jsx
|   |   +-- VoicePanel.jsx
|   |   +-- EngineStatus.jsx
|   |   +-- ConsciousnessMonitor.jsx
|   |   +-- PersonalityMonitorPanel.jsx
|   |   +-- ContextDebugPanel.jsx
|   |   +-- ConversationCache.jsx
|   |   +-- ThoughtStream.jsx
|   |   +-- TuningPanel.jsx
|   |   +-- GlassCard.jsx
|   |   +-- GradientOrb.jsx
|   |   +-- StatusDot.jsx
|   +-- hooks/
|       +-- useLunaAPI.js
|       +-- useChat.js
|       +-- useVoice.js
+-- index.html
+-- package.json
+-- tailwind.config.js
+-- vite.config.js

sections.title: Summary Statistics

rows: Core API client, status polling (2s interval)
Spring physics follow behavior for orb

subscription_cleanup_audit.description: All hooks and components properly clean up their subscriptions.

minor_issues: TuningPanel/EngineStatus setTimeout - No cleanup on unmount (minor: state update after unmount)
API base URL hardcoded - Should move to environment variable
Unused components - LunaAutoTuner, MemoryEconomyPanel, LLMProviderDropdown exported but not rendered

rows: v3.0 Bible Audit - Updated counts (20 components, 5 hooks), added cleanup audit
Initial release of Part XVI: Luna Hub UI

closing_statement: The Luna Hub is the window into Luna's consciousness. Every panel, every animation, every status indicator is designed to make the invisible visible - to show you not just what Luna says, but how she thinks.
notes: Pages 301-320 contain the continuation and conclusion of Part XVI: Luna Hub UI
The section covers frontend components, hooks, design system, SSE integration, and UX patterns
No diagrams were present in these pages - content is primarily component documentation with code blocks and tables
